## Checklist

- [ ] Linked to an issue, or small enough not to need one
- [ ] `cd api && uv run pytest` passes
- [ ] `cd web && bun run test && bun run typecheck` passes
- [ ] One focused change (unrelated fixes split into their own PRs)
